# =============================================================================
# Dockerfile — Cloud Run Job Pipeline Application
# =============================================================================
# Multi-stage build: JDK for compilation, Distroless for runtime.
# Replace all PLACEHOLDER values before use.
#
# PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT  — SBT sub-project name (e.g., bills-pipeline)
# PLACEHOLDER_JAR      — Assembly JAR filename (e.g., bills-pipeline-assembly-0.1.0.jar)
# PLACEHOLDER_MAIN     — Fully qualified main class (e.g., com.repcheck.BillsPipelineApp)
# =============================================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Stage 1: Build — compile and assemble fat JAR
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk AS build

WORKDIR /app

# Copy SBT structure first for Docker layer caching.
# Dependencies change less often than source code, so this layer is cached
# across builds that only change application code.
COPY project/ project/
COPY build.sbt .

# Resolve dependencies in a separate layer (cached if build.sbt unchanged)
RUN sbt update

# Copy full source and assemble
COPY . .
RUN sbt "PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT / assembly"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Stage 2: Runtime — minimal Distroless image
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Why Distroless:
#   - No shell, no package manager (~130MB vs ~300MB for JRE)
#   - Minimal attack surface (no shell injection possible)
#   - Google maintains security patches
#   - Trade-off: cannot docker exec for debugging (use Cloud Logging)
FROM gcr.io/distroless/java21-debian12

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the fat JAR from the build stage
COPY --from=build /app/PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT/target/scala-3.7.3/PLACEHOLDER_JAR app.jar

# JVM tuning for Cloud Run:
#   -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0 — use 75% of container memory limit
#   JDK 21 is container-aware by default (reads cgroup limits)
#
# No EXPOSE — Cloud Run Jobs are batch (run, process, exit), not HTTP-serving.
# For Cloud Run Services, add: EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0", "-jar", "app.jar"]


# =============================================================================
# .dockerignore — place this content in a .dockerignore file at repo root
# =============================================================================
# target/
# .idea/
# .bsp/
# .metals/
# .git/
# docs/
# blog/
# .claude/
# *.md
# .github/
# =============================================================================
